Name: departments_by_pk
SQL: WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" WHERE "public"."departments"."id" = $1::uuid AND "public"."departments"."id" = ANY($2::uuid[]) LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."name" AS "name") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base"
